purpose: Scheduled runtime governance audits to continuously verify runtime health, detect governance drift, and detect integrity violations.

rules.condition: governance JSON artifact does not validate against its declared schema
rules.description: All canonical JSON artifacts must validate against their schemas.

rules.condition: ticket or milestone dependency references non-existent entity or creates cycle
rules.description: Dependency graph must be acyclic and fully resolved.

rules.condition: milestone has invalid status, missing tickets, or orphaned references
rules.description: Milestone definitions must be internally consistent.

rules.condition: runtime state file is malformed, execution state diverges from history, or heartbeat is stale
rules.description: Runtime state must be continuous and consistent.

rules.condition: markdown reflection is stale or missing relative to canonical JSON source
rules.description: Projections must accurately reflect canonical state.

rules.condition: event stream has gaps, duplicates, or out-of-order timestamps
rules.description: Event streams must be append-only and monotonic.

invariants.expression: same runtime state always produces identical audit score and findings
severity score is always an integer between 0 and 100 inclusive
invariants.description: Severity score must be bounded and deterministic.

invariants.expression: every audit produces both machine-readable JSON and human-readable Markdown report
invariants.description: Reports must be accessible to both systems and humans.

triggers.condition: after every milestone status change to completed
